# MAN(1) — Terminal Depths Man Page

## NAME
  man — display manual page

## SYNOPSIS
  man [OPTIONS] [ARGS]

## DESCRIPTION
Show the manual page for a command.

## OPTIONS
  <command>  command to look up

## EXAMPLES
  man ls
  man nmap
  man exploit

## ENVIRONMENT
  Terminal Depths v1.0 — cyberpunk hacking simulation

## SEE ALSO
  help, man, commands
